[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10111101 6
1 00000000 a
2 00011000 2
3 01001110 4
4 01001101 4
5 11001001 4
6 11011010 5
7 10100100 3

01 10 00001000 1
12 21 01001100 3
23 32 01001001 3
34 43 11001000 3
45 54 10000000 1
56 65 00100000 1
67 76 00111001 4
70 07 00011000 2 match 2

02 20 00001000 1
13 31 01001000 2
24 42 01001000 2
35 53 10000000 1
46 64 00011010 3
57 75 10100100 3 match 7
60 06 00011000 2 match 2
71 17 00001100 2

14 41 01001010 3

36 63 00001001 2
47 74 10011000 3
50 05 00000000 a match 1
61 16 00001010 2
72 27 00001101 3

15 51 00000100 1

37 73 10001001 3
